title: More Food and Tools
description: This mod adds tools, armor, and more
body:
Fabric only This mod adds a bunch of new things. Here is how to craft a Diamond Apple ![Diamond Apple Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70c8613095644d06bbd6fa878a6ab4999005a9bd.png) You can also trade with Master Toolsmith villagers to get a Diamond Apple ![Diamond Apple Trade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90e50713588f2f19fefb5f9a66cb2b52b03d9643.png) To get a Regeneration Apple you will Need to trade with Expert Toolsmith villagers. 5 Iron Ingots for a Regeration Apple. 5 Diamonds for an Enchanted Regeneration Apple. To get a Potion of Resistance you will need an Awkward Potion with an Iron Sword, Golden Sword, Diamond Sword, Netherite Sword or an Ultra Sword. ![Potion of Resistance Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10d5881391b1ce0fadcddf57144cd8f31486def8.png) To get an 8 minute Potion of Resistance you will need some Redstone Dust. ![Long Potion of Resistance Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e44151421db8b7079df395544b95eb09fa647ce.png) To get Ultra tools you would craft it the same way as other tools but you need to use Eyes of Ender ![Ultra Chestplate Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba3cd5e00b548bfb057af4a9ec3f339367c8159e.png) This also adds the Enchanted Golden Apple recipe back ![Enchanted Golden Apple recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed175d34edcb27c52cfc17f921241b5e2f6c0bcd.png) FAQ Can I use this mod in my modpack? Yes, you can use this mod in your modpack. Please give credit.
Spoiler This mod adds - Diamond Apples - Regeneration Apples - Potion of Resistance - Old Enchanted Golden Apple Recipe - Ultra Pickaxe - Ultra Sword - Ultra Armor
